---
title: "Exam & weekly quizzes"
---

To pass the course you must fulfil **two** requirements:

```{=html}
<div class="req-grid">
  <div class="req"><span class="k">Requirement 1 · during the semester</span>
    <p><strong>Complete at least 10 weekly Absalon quizzes.</strong> Each quiz is short, individual,
    and must be submitted on the <a href="https://absalon.ku.dk/courses/70545">Absalon course page</a>
    within two weeks of its release. Only by submitting at least 10 of the 14 do you qualify for
    the exam.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="req"><span class="k">Requirement 2 · the exam</span>
    <p><strong>Submit the home assignment by 12 January 2026, 12:00 (noon).</strong> You analyse a
    dataset in R and write up your results — guidelines below.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

# The exam

::: callout-start
Full exam guidelines, pre-registrations, and data will be published here later in the semester.
:::
